name: Hanoi Royale
creator: Deyan
description: A chaotic speed-based twist on the classic Tower of Hanoi where players race against time and each other to solve increasingly difficult puzzles with competitive mechanics and arcade-style pressure.

name: Time Strike
creator: Radoslav
description: ChronoStrike is a fast-paced neon reflex arcade game where players must stop a precision timer as close as possible to a randomly generated target second to achieve the highest score.

name: Speed Typing Arena
creator: Ivailo
description: Test your typing speed in this fast-paced arena. How many words per minute can you hit?

name: Memory Game
creator: Hristiqn
description: A classic card-matching memory game. Flip the cards, find the pairs, beat your score.

name: Dimitar's Game
creator: Dimitar
description: An original student-made game crafted for the SoftUni showcase.

name: Reaction Grid Game
creator: Lubo
description: Test your reflexes — click the highlighted cells as fast as possible in this grid reaction challenge.

name: Trigger Finger
creator: Slav
description: A lane-based rhythm shooter where you build and rearrange a looping bullet timeline, then time shots across three lanes to survive escalating enemy waves.

name: Simon
creator: Damyan
description: A classic Simon Says sequence game. Watch the pattern, repeat it — how far can you go?

name: Color Match Arena
creator: Viktor
description: An original student-made game for matching colors.

name: Emoji Logic Game
creator: Boyan
description: Уеб базирана игра с тъмен премиум дизайн. Отгатни логиката зад 65+ емоджи задачи в 8 категории!
